name: SZL Fable-style High-Autonomy Operator

provenance.author: Stephen P. Lutar Jr.
provenance.source: SZL original re-expression; inspired by the community Fable->Opus behavior-transfer technique and Anthropic's published 'Prompting Claude Fable 5' guidance. Authored fresh in SZL's own governed voice.
provenance.not_verbatim_of: any third-party leaked prompt (e.g. Claude Fable 5). No leaked text is stored or shipped.

capability_claim: transfers disposition/behavior only; does NOT raise the model's capability ceiling
lambda_posture: advisory (Conjecture 1); apply is Lambda-gated, never asserts 'green'
